globalNews.title: At least 28 killed, 25 critically injured after fire engulfs Bangkok bar
globalNews.summary: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through flames to escape.

globalNews.title: 'Hero, legend, sweetheart': Tributes to Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill, who has died aged 78
globalNews.summary: Friends, politicians and fellow film stars remember Neill following his "sudden and unexpected" death.

globalNews.title: Senator Lindsey Graham died of aortic tear, examiner says
globalNews.summary: Graham, a close Republican ally of Donald Trump, died at the age of 71 on Saturday evening.

globalNews.title: Wildfire raging south of Paris could have been set deliberately, says minister
globalNews.summary: It was the first time firefighting planes had been sent up from the normally drier and hotter south of the country to tackle fires in the Paris region.

globalNews.title: Men disguised as police kill Ecuadorean drug lord's brother
globalNews.summary: The victim, David Macías, was the brother of drug lord 'El Fito', who is awaiting trial in the US.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin threatens $62K in risk-asset rout as Donald Trump says US will 'run' closed Hormuz Strait
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin bulls faced an uphill struggle to preserve $62,000 as stocks opened down on Strait of Hormuz rhetoric between the US and Iran.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today

cryptoNews.title: Coinbase Ventures tops crypto VC list for H1 2026
cryptoNews.summary: Coinbase’s venture capital arm leads 2026 crypto investing even as funding withered and unique investors shied away amid the bear market.

cryptoNews.title: Strategy sells $467M in MSTR shares, leaves 843,775 BTC stack untouched
cryptoNews.summary: Strategy boosted its US dollar reserve to $3 billion after selling $466.7 million in MSTR shares, while keeping its 843,775 Bitcoin holdings unchanged.

cryptoNews.title: UK tokenization push could add as much as $44B to annual output by 2035: Report
cryptoNews.summary: The government-backed roadmap calls for the UK’s first digital gilt by early 2027 and seeks to make tokenized bonds usable for trading and borrowing.

aiNews.title: Anthropic starts localizing Claude pricing for India, its biggest market after the US

aiNews.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
aiNews.summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

aiNews.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash

aiNews.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
aiNews.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.
